_comment: Curated 'where to look' map for the roles lens. Backward-compatible: ATS entries still carry {slug, ats, id}; non-ATS sources carry roleSourceStatus/sourceType/url/verified/note and are skipped by the ATS fetcher. No LinkedIn scraping.

_endpoints.teamtailor: https://{id}/jobs.json (JSON Feed 1.1 spec; {id} is the full custom-domain host, e.g. careers.chathamhouse.org)

sources.note: Greenhouse board is a curated subset, not the full Google careers site. Live 2026-07-02 run returned 10 jobs and no policy/legal/governance matches; keep as partial ATS coverage.
Live 2026-07-02 run returned 109 jobs. The only legal/policy keyword match was Sunnyvale Commercial Legal Counsel, so no London policy role was added to the feed.
Official Turing careers portal is HTML and currently lists 7 roles; several AI/security research roles need manual policy-relevance review before feed insertion.
Official working-at-Ada page resolved; no machine-readable ATS found. Use as careers source and manually check role pages.

URL corrected 2026-07-02: prior /jobs path now 404s (caught by first automated scout --json health baseline; scout reported 2 false-positive candidates off the 404 page). Real careers page is /work-with-us ('Career Opportunities | CLTR Think Tank Jobs', HTTP 200, verified by curl). Existing feed has a manually verified Operations Associate role.
UK AI Safety Institute — 6 London roles at check time (Frontier Research Engineer Security, Chem-Bio engineering leads, Red Team EoI). Discovered via parallel ATS probe sweep.
DSIT policy roles are advertised through Civil Service Jobs, not a directorate-specific board. Treat as parent-department source.
Official TBI careers page; no ATS endpoint found in Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby sweep.
Live 2026-07-02 run returned 1 job and no relevant policy/legal/governance role.
Official jobs page; bespoke HTML/manual check required.
Official Nesta jobs page (seed URL redirected/changed); bespoke HTML/manual check required.
Official Royal Society portal is JS-backed via Occupop/Cezanne; source verified but current vacancies need browser/API extraction.
CETaS roles appear via the parent Alan Turing Institute opportunities portal, not a separate CETaS board.
Official ODI work-with-us page loads Hireful/EasyWebATS; browser-network capture of job/all returned an empty array.
Official Frontier Economics careers page; bespoke/manual search required for policy-relevant roles.
CMA DMU roles are advertised through parent CMA/Civil Service recruitment, not a DMU-specific board.
Official ICO jobs page; bespoke/manual check required.
Workday board verified, but the CXS API rejects one-shot scripted POSTs with HTTP 400. Needs browser/session extraction for current Online Safety/AI-adjacent roles.
Live 2026-07-02 run returned 11 jobs and no relevant policy/legal/governance role.
Official careers page; no Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby endpoint found.
Live 2026-07-02 run returned 6 jobs and no relevant policy/legal/governance role.
Official vacancies route currently resolves to the main site; keep as manual-check source.
No stable first-party jobs URL found in search/fetch; use main site/news/manual review only.
Official latest opportunities page verified; current Executive Officer listing is not AI/policy-specific enough for feed insertion.
Official Oliver Wyman careers page; rejected unrelated Lever namespace collision.
Workday board verified, but the CXS API rejects one-shot scripted POSTs with HTTP 400. Needs browser/session extraction and policy-keyword filtering for data/privacy/cybersecurity roles.
Workday board verified, but the CXS API rejects one-shot scripted POSTs with HTTP 400. Needs browser/session extraction and policy-keyword filtering to avoid the global firehose.
Official Bain careers page; needs manual/site search for AI-policy-adjacent legal/governance roles.

Pinpoint endpoint verified. Added London Programme Assistant for Policy and Public Affairs and Programme Assistant for Tech and Innovation and Policy to feed. Rejected health-social-care and CEO-office admin roles. Discovered via careers-page HTML sweep 2026-07-02.
Broader CMA AI work is not a separate hiring entity; use parent CMA/Civil Service recruitment source.
AI Opportunity Unit roles are advertised through DSIT/Civil Service Jobs, not a unit-specific board.
Official RUSI job opportunities page verified; page says current opportunities appear below and none were listed at fetch time.
Official LSE Jobs page; seed careers URL was wrong (Cohere). Use LSE jobs plus department pages for manual checks.
14 roles at check time incl. Senior AI Governance Researcher (direct policy signal) and AI Security & Control Engineer. Discovered via parallel ATS probe sweep.
Official GovAI opportunities page verified; current London/DC fellowships and EOI roles are listed directly on first-party site.

Pinpoint endpoint verified. Added all 4 London roles to feed: Science & Technology Leads (Next-Gen Compute Architectures, Multi-Agent Security, AI for Chemistry), Technical & Translational Lead for Safeguarded AI (Cybersecurity). Discovered via careers-page HTML sweep 2026-07-02.

Official Microsoft Eightfold API checked. Added London Senior Applied Scientist role in Microsoft 365 Copilot/Copilot and Agents Core as AI hiring signal; policy and AI-policy London queries returned no policy/legal role.
Official Meta careers GraphQL checked via browser for London + policy; all_jobs returned empty and featured jobs were unrelated infrastructure roles.

Official Bird & Bird CVMail board checked; added London Senior Associate - Tech Transactions (including AI Contracting & Governance) and Senior LegalTech & Innovation Executive roles. Rejected business-acceptance roles as not AI/regulatory-policy specific.

Workday board/job page verified. Added AI Benefits & Value Technical Specialist (London, Data/Technology/Innovation, AI Product Development) to feed. CXS listing API still rejects one-shot scripted POSTs; direct job page is verified primary source. Discovered via careers-page HTML sweep 2026-07-02.
Official McKinsey/QuantumBlack careers search verified; dynamic search needs browser/API extraction.
Official Bank of England careers page; no ATS endpoint found.
NHS AI/transformation roles are advertised through NHS Jobs or NHS England parent recruitment, not a programme-specific board.
Official BBC SuccessFactors RSS search verified. Added London Lead Project Manager - Gen AI role in Strategy and Transformation; rejected generic RSS production/commercial matches.
Official Cambridge jobs source for Bennett School/Public Policy; portal returned 503 to scripted fetch but search shows Bennett listings. Needs browser/manual check.
Official OII vacancies page verified but fetch surfaced cookie text; use browser/manual page read.
Official i.AI careers page verified; live roles are Greenhouse links, but current roles are product/engineering/EOI rather than policy/legal/governance.
MHRA AI-relevant roles are advertised through parent MHRA/Civil Service Jobs, not an AI-specific board.

Teamtailor endpoint verified via custom domain (careers.chathamhouse.org/jobs.json, JSON Feed 1.1). Added Senior Research Fellow - International Security to feed because posting covers disruptive technologies and security-policy debate. Rejected leadership masterclass item. Discovered via careers-page HTML sweep 2026-07-02.
Official IPPR jobs page verified; page only describes internships/no advertised current role at fetch time.
Official Onward job-opportunities page verified; current indexed Head of Energy role is not AI-policy relevant.
Westminster-based govtech consultancy. Live 2026-07-02 run returned 1 role (Bid Associate), not AI-policy relevant.
Official Conjecture careers page verified; no ATS endpoint found.
Official Open Rights Group jobs page verified; no current role text surfaced at fetch time.
Official Foxglove jobs route verified; page contained no current vacancy content at fetch time.
Official Slaughter and May vacancy portal verified.
Official A&O Shearman UK careers page verified.
Official Pinsent Masons careers page verified.

Official Deloitte UK careers board checked; added London Assistant Director, Legal Strategy role because it explicitly references agentic AI adoption and legal-sector AI strategy. Rejected technical AI delivery roles.

Official PA Consulting jobs surface checked; added Risk & Regulation - Consultant Analyst because role evidence ties regulatory policy work to AI risk-management strategy. Rejected generic internship roles.
Official CFG careers page verified and currently advertises no open vacancies.

_unmapped._note: Slugs with no confirmed first-party role source after the 2026-07-02 roles credibility pass. Mapped/checked slugs must not appear here.
_unmapped._probe_2026_07_02_workday: Careers-page HTML sweep found Workday embed strings for fca-ai/ofcom-ai/linklaters-ai/hogan-lovells-ai. Each verified via POST /wday/cxs/{tenant}/{board}/jobs and returns real jobs. Also found but not converted: aria-safeguarded-ai (Pinpoint), chatham-house-ai (Teamtailor), techuk (Pinpoint), cma-broader-ai/cma-dmu (Civil Service Jobs). TBI Workday probe returned total=null — HTML-only for now. Benevolentai Workable public JSON 404s — HTML-only.
_unmapped._probe_2026_07_02_pinpoint_teamtailor: Cracked Pinpoint public JSON ({id}.pinpointhq.com/jobs.json → {data:[...]}) and Teamtailor custom-domain public JSON ({host}/jobs.json → JSON Feed 1.1 with items[]). Added: aria-safeguarded-ai (Pinpoint, 4 roles all directly relevant), techuk (Pinpoint, 4 roles), chatham-house-ai (Teamtailor, 2 items). Civil Service Jobs verified DEAD-END without browser tier: SID session-gated (all HTML search URLs return the same 12KB init shell, 0 results). DWP Find a Job is shut down. Gov roles (dsit, cma, ico, i-dot-ai, mhra, nhs) will require browser-tool tier or per-department page monitoring.
